title: onobrychis cyri
intro: Onobrychis cyri, also known as the Persian clover or Iranian clover, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Onobrychis cyri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or powder for medicinal use.
